name: apex_ak_fusion_formula

formula.sigma_delta: sum of active EVM defect costs
formula.v10_3_equivalence: ΔG ≈ Ω_A × EVM_full × G_neuro × G_self × G_evm × G_devour

apex_mapping.Ω_A: Ω_A = G_base × (Λ·Θ·K·ξ·Ψ·Φ) — 系统固有能力 × 增益因子乘积
apex_mapping.EVM_full: EVM_full ≈ 1/(H·T·ε) — 熵损耗校正因子，健康基准=0.7691
apex_mapping.ΣΔ_all: ΣΔ_all — 活跃 EVM 缺陷代价比率，等效于 ΔG 分母中的损耗项
apex_mapping.APEX_AK_vs_DeltaG: APEX_AK 纯净版，去掉 G_neuro/G_self/G_devour 增益；ΔG_evolved 含完整增益链

implementation.benchmark_integration: APEX_AK box printed at end of benchmark report

key_insight: EVM_full=0.7691 is hard ceiling — even perfect Ω_A=1.0 gives APEX_AK≤0.7691. ΣΔ_all is immediate defect cost, not cumulative — fixing defects immediately raises APEX_AK.
